title: rudbeckia serotina f. tubuliformis
intro: Rudbeckia serotina f. tubuliformis, also known as Black-eyed Susan, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its roots and flowers. The health benefits of Rudbeckia serotina f. tubuliformis include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
